notes: Running head matches. Body is largely correct, but one substantive body error: ἡμῶν inserted after πρόσταγμά though absent in print. Apparatus has one clear substantive omission of section marker 'V 3' before εἶπεν]+ and one clear error 'om μοι' for 'om'. Other apparatus differences are mostly accentuation/diacritics visible in the scan.
